description: Validator for the Pivot callflow element

cdr_url.description: Optional URL to send the CDR to at the end of the call

custom_request_headers.description: Custom HTTP X- headers to be included on each Pivot request to the voice_url

debug.description: Store debug logs related to processing this Pivot call

method.description: What HTTP verb to send the request(s) with

req_body_format.description: What format should the request body have when using POST

req_format.description: What format of Pivot will the your server respond with

req_timeout_ms.description: How long, in milliseconds, to wait for a Pivot response from the HTTP server

serverless.description: Use provided Pivot flow without requiring an external server to execute

flow_doc.description: Execute this serverless Pivot flow without making a request to a server. It can be either a valid PivotML or valid Callflow object

flow_type.description: Specifies the type of Pivot flow

skip_module.description: When set to true this callflow action is skipped, advancing to the wildcard branch (if any)

voice_url.description: What URL to request the initial Pivot callflow
